summary: STEP 0: RED regression guard authored (2/4 RED). @raike/lib-db resolves outside BACKEND_DIR; package.json pin wrong. mysql2+knex GREEN. Fix not applied.

findings.claim: @raike/lib-db declared file:../../packages/lib-db — outside Docker COPY context; boot crashes Cannot find module
findings.evidence: require.resolve('@raike/lib-db', { paths: [BACKEND_DIR] }) returns DEV/packages/lib-db/src/index.js (outside BACKEND_DIR); tests/unit/vendor-deps.test.js:72 FAIL and :110 FAIL on current tree
findings.fix: Vendor lib-db into bug-reporter-backend/vendor/lib-db/; update package.json to file:./vendor/lib-db; regenerate package-lock; npm ci; regression tests must go 4/4 GREEN
